summary: Iteration 224 - Divine Director V2 4-Tier Subscription System Testing. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Core UI elements working (Divine Director page, Suanpan panel, Speed Bridge modal with 4 tiers, track controls with waveform visualization). Issue: Sources and Packs panels show 0 items due to 401 auth errors when navigating directly to /suanpan - auth context not fully initialized before API calls.

integration_issues.issue: API calls return 401 when navigating directly to /suanpan - authHeaders empty before auth context fully initialized

action_items: Fix auth context timing issue in SuanpanMixer.js - destructure 'loading' from useAuth() and wait for it to be false before making API calls
Add dependency on auth loading state in useEffect that loads mixer data
critical_code_review_comments: mixer_director.py: 4-tier system correctly implemented (discovery/player/ultra_player/sovereign) with layer caps (3/8/20/unlimited)
mixer_director.py: 21 STOCK_SOURCES correctly defined across 4 tiers with proper tier-gating
mixer_director.py: 5 BONUS_PACKS with bonus_wrap (speed_boost or ai_credits) and tier requirements
mixer_director.py: Duplicate pack purchase prevention returns 400, tier-gating returns 403
mixer_director.py: Layer cap enforcement returns 403 with clear error message
SuanpanMixer.js: Missing auth loading check - only destructures authHeaders, not loading from useAuth()
SuanpanMixer.js: Speed Bridge modal correctly shows 4 tier cards with upgrade buttons
SuanpanMixer.js: Track row has waveform visualization bars and grip handles
SuanpanMixer.js: Sacred Assembly loader implemented for Discovery tier (materialization_delay > 10)
test_credentials: email: grad_test_522@test.com, password: password (upgraded to ultra_player during tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 224 verified: (1) GET /api/mixer/subscription returns 4 tiers (discovery/player/ultra_player/sovereign), 10 comparison rows, all_tiers. (2) POST /api/mixer/subscription/upgrade validates sequential tier upgrades. (3) GET /api/mixer/sources returns 21 sources with correct tier-gating. (4) GET /api/mixer/bonus-packs returns 5 packs with ownership, tier-gating, affordability. (5) POST /api/mixer/bonus-packs/purchase handles duplicate (400), tier-locked (403), nonexistent (404). (6) POST /api/mixer/projects enforces layer cap per tier (3/8/20/unlimited). (7) Frontend Divine Director at /suanpan loads with tier badge and layer count. (8) Suanpan panel works with bead interface. (9) Speed Bridge modal shows 4-tier comparison. (10) Track row has waveform visualization and controls. (11) Auth issue: Sources/Packs panels empty due to 401 - need to wait for auth loading. (12) Test user was upgraded to ultra_player during backend tests.

4_tier_subscription.details: GET /api/mixer/subscription returns all 4 tiers with correct configs

10_comparison_rows.details: Comparison table has 10 rows with all 4 tier columns

layer_cap_enforcement.details: POST /api/mixer/projects returns 403 when exceeding layer cap

divine_director_page.details: Page loads at /suanpan with tier badge and layer count

suanpan_panel.details: Bead interface works, Add as Track button adds track

speed_bridge_modal.details: Shows 4 tier cards (discovery/player/ultra_player/sovereign) with upgrade buttons

track_waveform_visualization.details: Track row shows 12 animated waveform bars

track_controls.details: Volume, mute, solo, remove, grip handle all present

sources_panel.details: Panel opens but shows 0 sources due to 401 auth error

packs_panel.details: Panel opens but shows 0 packs due to 401 auth error

ghost_tracks.details: Not visible in tests - may depend on sources loading

rca_of_the_issue: The SuanpanMixer.js component makes API calls in useEffect with [authHeaders] dependency. When navigating directly to /suanpan, the authHeaders object is initially empty because the token hasn't been loaded from localStorage yet. The component should also destructure 'loading' from useAuth() and add it to the useEffect dependency, only making API calls when loading is false.
